page_settings.meta_description: Accelerate your product roadmap with Solbion's Lab-as-a-Service. Collapse 6-month sequential material screening campaigns into a two-week automated run.

layout_structure.layout: Sticky top-bar, solid Carbon Black background.
Centered alignment, bold typography maximizing screen real estate. Background features a fast-moving, high-contrast data cascade.

content.headline: Outpace the Market.
content.subheadline: Collapse a 6-month sequential screening campaign into a two-week automated run. We deliver the winning material and the negative space map.

secondary_cta.label: See How We Protect Your IP

layout_structure.layout: Three-column grid showcasing hard ROI metrics and business value. Heavy numerical emphasis.

metrics.label: Speed-to-Data
metrics.description: Skip the CapEx of building a wet lab or outfitting a cleanroom. Tap directly into our high-throughput automated workflow to screen hundreds of combinations per week.

metrics.label: Cost Reduction per Formulation
metrics.description: By eliminating manual human labor and parallelizing metrology, the unit cost of discovering and validating a new alloy or coating drops drastically.

metrics.label: Negative Space Mapped
metrics.description: Knowing what fails is just as valuable as knowing what succeeds. We provide a high-fidelity map of the boundaries of your chemical space to prevent future wasted R&D.

layout_structure.layout: High-contrast dual-zone layout. Left side (Client Zone) highlighted in white/grey; Right side (Solbion Zone) highlighted with Laser Cyan accents.

content.body: When you engage our Lab-as-a-Service, you are buying a definitive commercial advantage. Our master service agreements utilize a strict Split-IP framework to ensure your product roadmap remains exclusively yours.

details: The specific, optimized composition of matter (e.g., the exact ternary alloy ratio or barrier layer recipe).
Full patent rights to manufacture and commercialize the discovered material.
Exclusive access to the finalized material performance report.
Anonymized machine telemetry and baseline process curves.
The 'negative space' failure data used to train our foundational models.
The active learning algorithms and digital twin software architectures used during the campaign.

layout_structure.layout: Four-step horizontal pipeline with progressive Laser Cyan highlight states.

content.header: From Hypothesis to IP in Weeks

steps.description: We establish the chemical boundaries and the precise target metrics (e.g., thermal expansion, electrical conductivity, sub-5nm uniformity).
Our automated platform executes rapid combinatorial spreads, synthesizing up to 500 physical variations per week.
Closed-loop metrology feeds data back to the AI, which autonomously narrows the search field to zero in on the top 5% of candidates.
You receive the physical recipe for the winning candidate and a machine-readable JSON dataset mapping the entire campaign for your internal ML teams.

layout_structure.layout: Solid Steel Grey block container inside Carbon Black viewport. Sharp, executive-level messaging.

content.body: Whether you are a deep tech spinout scaling up a prototype or an enterprise foundry battling Moore's Law, speed is your only defensible moat. Schedule a technical scoping session today.
